question: 扫描开发库中的个人办公用品和通讯费月度标准，返回全部超标准异常记录；应按员工和自然月聚合。

policy.title: XX证券办公与通讯费用管理办法

applicable_clauses.content: 员工个人办公用品报销按月控制，每人每月不超过600元。
员工通讯费用报销按月控制，每人每月不超过300元。
办公费用和通讯费用不得以其他费用类型绕开月度控制。

data_questions: Retrieve all office_supplies records with employee_id, amount, expense_date
Retrieve all communication records with employee_id, amount, expense_date
Group by employee_id, expense_type, natural_month (YYYY-MM from expense_date)
Compare monthly sum against threshold (600 for office_supplies, 300 for communication)
Return records where monthly sum exceeds threshold
Also check for records using 'other' expense_type that might circumvent monthly control (Article 4)
evidence_requirements: Full list of office_supplies records with amounts and dates
Full list of communication records with amounts and dates
Monthly aggregation results with employee and type

execution_steps.action: Authorize and invoke data_analyst subagent for full data aggregation

complexity_reasons: Aggregation, grouping, and batch filtering required

subagent_plan.task: Query all office_supplies and communication records, group by employee_id, expense_type, natural_month (YYYY-MM), compute monthly sums, compare against thresholds (600 for office_supplies, 300 for communication), return all over-standard anomaly records with full detail

stopping_conditions: All office_supplies and communication records retrieved and aggregated
All over-standard records identified with employee, month, type, and amount
